title: acetosa acetosella
intro: Acetosa acetosella, also known as wood sorrel, is a perennial herb belonging to the Oxalis genus. The plant is recognized by its heart-shaped leaves and white or pink flowers. Acetosa acetosella has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of oxalic acid. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions to reap its health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, skin conditions, and wounds.
